approaches.rationale: Single-module Go CLI with standard layout and go.mod/go.sum; Gazelle + rules_go generates a fine-grained graph natively. The true port.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "gitleaks",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_go", version = "0.61.1")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")

go_sdk = use_extension("@rules_go//go:extensions.bzl", "go_sdk")
go_sdk.download(version = "1.25.4")

go_deps = use_extension("@gazelle//:extensions.bzl", "go_deps")
go_deps.from_file(go_mod = "//:go.mod")
approaches.root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")

# gazelle:prefix github.com/zricethezav/gitleaks/v8
# gazelle:exclude testdata
gazelle(name = "gazelle")
anticipated_risks: testdata git fixtures (dotGit dirs) referenced by tests as runfiles
tests that shell out or need git binary
